<!--
Thanks for contributing to NeuroDock.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full contribution guide.
-->

## Summary

What changed and why. Keep it short. Link any related issues or RFCs.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore / tooling
- [ ] Other:

## Affected packages

List the packages touched in `packages/`, `plugins/`, or workspace root.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated; suite passes locally (`pnpm turbo run test` and/or `uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Lint and typecheck pass locally (`pnpm turbo run lint typecheck` and/or `uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy packages`)
- [ ] Accessibility considered (if change affects user-facing output, docs, or extension UI)
- [ ] ND-rater review requested when the change targets a specific neurotype's workflow
- [ ] Changeset entry added for any user-facing change (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Docs updated when behaviour, schemas, or CLI surface changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything specific you want eyes on, or context that helps review.
